title: Hadoop MapReduce Partitioning and Security
description: The 'Partitioner.java' file defines an abstract class for controlling key partitioning in MapReduce jobs, using a hash function to determine partition numbers. The 'lib/partition' directory contains custom partitioners like BinaryPartitioner, HashPartitioner, and KeyFieldBasedPartitioner, showcasing the Strategy design pattern for diverse partitioning needs. The 'security/token/delegation' directory manages MapReduce tokens for secure job submission and tracking, utilizing the Delegate pattern for secure access and job management. These components collaborate through extending common superclasses, enabling flexible data distribution and secure job execution in Hadoop MapReduce architecture.

raw_response:
TITLE: Hadoop MapReduce Partitioning and Security

DESCRIPTION:
The 'Partitioner.java' file defines an abstract class for controlling key partitioning in MapReduce jobs, using a hash function to determine partition numbers. The 'lib/partition' directory contains custom partitioners like BinaryPartitioner, HashPartitioner, and KeyFieldBasedPartitioner, showcasing the Strategy design pattern for diverse partitioning needs. The 'security/token/delegation' directory manages MapReduce tokens for secure job submission and tracking, utilizing the Delegate pattern for secure access and job management. These components collaborate through extending common superclasses, enabling flexible data distribution and secure job execution in Hadoop MapReduce architecture.
